nodes.label: Joel
nodes.description: A Levite of the family of Gershom (1 Chr. 15:7, 11).

verses.text: Of the sons of Gershom; Joel the chief, and his brethren an hundred and thirty:
And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,
